steps.title: Identify what the underlined word must mean
steps.content: The text uses the word "spread" to describe the zoo: it was "spread over numberless acres." The question asks what "spread" most nearly means in this context. The zoo's vast physical area and the detail that it required a train to explore it signal that "spread" describes extent across space.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test each choice as a substitute for "spread":
  • Choice A — Hidden: means concealed — the zoo is described as large and explorable, not concealed; this contradicts the context. ✗
  • Choice B — Discussed: means talked about — a zoo cannot be "discussed over numberless acres"; this is not a spatial meaning at all. ✗
  • Choice C — Extended: means stretched or distributed across an area — the zoo extended over numberless acres, matching the sense of vast physical coverage. ✓
  • Choice D — Coated: means covered with a surface layer — a zoo is not "coated" over acres; this word applies to surfaces, not spatial distribution. ✗
That matches Choice C — Extended.
